ddls:
CREATE TABLE "network_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the network device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of network device (e.g., router, switch, firewall) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lags" (
  "lag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LAG */,
  "lag_name" TEXT /* Name of the LAG */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of the LAG (active or passive) */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that owns the LAG */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the LAG was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the LAG was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lags_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lag_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LAG member */,
  "lag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LAG that this member belongs to */,
  "interface_name" TEXT /* Name of the Ethernet interface */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that owns the interface */,
  "interface_speed" TEXT /* Speed of the interface (e.g., 1000 Mbps, 10 Gbps) */,
  "interface_duplex" TEXT /* Duplex mode of the interface (e.g., full, half) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lag_members_lag_id FOREIGN KEY ("lag_id") REFERENCES lags ("lag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lag_members_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lag_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LAG configuration */,
  "lag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LAG that this configuration belongs to */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration (e.g., LACP) */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lag_configurations_lag_id FOREIGN KEY ("lag_id") REFERENCES lags ("lag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_interfaces" (
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interface */,
  "interface_name" TEXT /* Name of the interface */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that owns the interface */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the interface */,
  "subnet_mask" TEXT /* Subnet mask of the interface */,
  "vlan_id" INTEGER /* VLAN ID associated with the interface */,
  "mtu" INTEGER /* Maximum transmission unit (MTU) of the interface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interface_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_interfaces_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer, operator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time of the log entry */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message describing the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device affected by the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_log_date FOREIGN KEY ("log_date") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that this metric belongs to */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interface that this metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., CPU utilization, bandwidth usage) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "metric_time" TEXT /* Time of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., percent, bytes per second) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES network_interfaces ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that this alarm belongs to */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interface that this alarm belongs to */,
  "alarm_name" TEXT /* Name of the alarm (e.g., high CPU utilization, high bandwidth usage) */,
  "alarm_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alarm (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "alarm_date" TEXT /* Date of the alarm */,
  "alarm_time" TEXT /* Time of the alarm */,
  "alarm_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the alarm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES network_interfaces ("interface_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that this permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
